label: Model Feedback (Bioactivity)
description: Feed wetlab bioactivity data back into LigaSpace and DTIGN model training to improve future predictions.

defaultInputs.name: Wetlab Validation Data
defaultInputs.tooltip: Measured IC50 results from wetlab validation.

defaultOutputs.name: Model Name
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Name of the updated prediction model.

defaultOutputs.name: New Training Samples
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Number of new data points added to training set.

defaultOutputs.name: Previous RMSE
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Root mean squared error before retraining.

defaultOutputs.name: Updated RMSE
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Root mean squared error after retraining.

configSchema.label: Models to Retrain
configSchema.tooltip: Select which bioactivity prediction models to update with the new wetlab data.

configSchema.label: Retrain Strategy
configSchema.tooltip: Fine-tuning adds new samples incrementally; full retrain rebuilds from all data.
